# Workflow Standards

## Why helpful

Workflows enforce standards in CI, which complements local hooks and editor settings.

## How to use

1. Start with focused checks (format, lint, test).
2. Keep outputs actionable.
3. Reuse templates across repos for consistency.

1. Keep workflows focused and fast.
2. Fail clearly with actionable output.
3. Use least privilege permissions.
4. Prefer reusable checks that can be copied into project repos.
